tickets.title: Fix recurring: API shape assumptions
tickets.description:
Address recurring pattern [types]: Assuming property names or structure of internal APIs without reading the definition. #1 hazard source across S39-S44.

Prevention: Always LSP hover or read the source type definition before consuming any internal API.

tickets.title: Fix recurring: Review-discovered hazards inflate scores
tickets.description:
Address recurring pattern [process]: Every hazard since S43 was found by post-hole review, never during coding. S49: all 3 hazards in autonomous sprint caught by manual code review. The review gate works but is a trailing indicator.

Prevention: Mid-ticket self-review after complex changes. Shift detection left — don't rely solely on post-hole review. For autonomous sprints, code review is mandatory.
acceptance_criteria: Recurring pattern "Review-discovered hazards inflate scores" addressed
